originalBehavior: The published mathematical follow-up hydrates KaTeX throughout the article and mounts a series of charts from #chart1 through #chart6 plus #animation-chart and #delta-chart.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original KaTeX assets, chart mount IDs, and compiled rendering logic so the mathematical narrative still appears in the published order.
notes: The local route preserves the published KaTeX placeholders and chart containers instead of reauthoring them.
Only shell metadata and provenance-facing copy were changed around the shipped runtime.
evidence: The implementation plan treats local KaTeX rendering and the major chart mounts as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage verifies that KaTeX hydrates locally and that the primary chart mounts render under the local bundle.

originalBehavior: The published route advances from a static interpolation-threshold example into an animated left-knot shift and then into a more extreme follow-up example to explain why the threshold fit can be unstable.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original chart4 to animation-chart to chart5 progression and surrounding copy so the interpolation-threshold walkthrough remains synchronized.
notes: The static and animated scenes still mount in the same order as the published article.
The walkthrough remains driven by the published bundle rather than a local reimplementation.
evidence: The implementation plan marks the static-to-animated progression from chart4 to animation-chart to chart5 as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage verifies those scenes mount cleanly and stay runtime-stable.

originalBehavior: Later sections show a delta diagram for the cubic-spline argument and conclude with a natural-cubic-spline endpoint scene that illustrates the infinitely large-model limit.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published delta-chart and chart6 scenes, including the corresponding explanatory math and rendered charts, under local assets.
notes: The spline-limit scene remains mounted in #chart6.
The delta diagram stays paired with the surrounding derivation instead of being flattened into static markup.
evidence: The implementation plan treats the delta-chart walkthrough and natural-cubic-spline endpoint scene as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage verifies both the delta diagram and chart6 mount without runtime errors.

originalBehavior: The published route included MLU branding, creator bylines, analytics, and series references that pointed back to the upstream public site.
localStatus: The local route removes those public-shell provenance surfaces, localizes the series references to the local double-descent page, and uses the shared footer as the single live original-page reference surface.
notes: Docs retain the upstream repo and provenance notes.
The public route now points back to the local part 1 route where the local equivalent exists.
evidence: The public-surface audit blocks creator names, MLU branding, upstream domains, analytics, and promo links in shipped route code.
The route now exposes only the shared-footer reference link back to the original page.
